description_long: This house is situated on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading from a main road to the main building. The structure is predominantly white with a flat roof and a modern, boxy design. The property includes a smaller outbuilding or garage near the driveway, separated from the main house. The main house features large windows on the front facade, facing a body of water, suggesting a scenic view. The surrounding landscape is grassy, with a paved road and a water boundary at one edge. The overall layout is open, with clear separation between the house, driveway, and auxiliary structure.
description: A modern, white, flat-roofed house with large front windows, a driveway, and a detached outbuilding, set on a grassy plot by a road and water.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house, driveway, and outbuilding, with the road in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway leading to the main house and the proximity to the water.
description_view_2: Rear view facing the water, showcasing the large windows and main entrance of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the water on the left, showing the driveway, outbuilding, and main house layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on the front, minimal windows elsewhere
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door with a small step, no porch or columns, and a clean, minimalist design.
